title: bidens ingrata
intro: Bidens ingrata, also known as the bitter buttonweed, is a tropical plant species belonging to the aster family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Bidens ingrata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Bidens ingrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine as a poultice or topical application to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
